data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimized choices to reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation with clear call-to-action paths.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Focused on making interactive elements easily accessible.
data.technical_spec: Properly spaced and adequately sized buttons and links.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content is organized into small, digestible groups.
data.technical_spec: Use of bullet points and concise text blocks.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design consistency across the site makes it intuitive.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design patterns and visually coherent UI.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements related by functionality are grouped together.
data.technical_spec: Logical content grouping for intuitive user flow.
